'''Chung''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ubuugan]] criminal.

==Biography==
[[1 ABY/Legends|One year]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Chung was captured by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], who imprisoned him in a cell on the [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']]. On their way to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] discovered a lost [[Starship/Legends|ship]] in [[Realspace/Legends|space]], the ''[[Mingula]]''. For the exploration of the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], he chose to take Chung's cell neighbor, [[Tsumo]], a criminal whose life could be spent, unlike the Ubuugan, who was wanted alive. After the attack of an [[Ubuugan fleshborer]] swarm which resulted in Tsumo's [[Death/Legends|death]], Fett headed back to the ''Slave I''. He was afraid that the creatures would go for Chung, leaving Fett without any [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] to collect. But when he reached Chung's cell, he was luckily surprised. He found the Ubuugan feasting on the remaining fleshborers. Like all the natives of [[Ubuuga]], Chung developed a natural defense against the deadly [[Parasite/Legends|parasites]], which saved his life and Fett's bounty.

==Appearances==
*[[Boba Fett ½|''Boba Fett'' ½]] {{1st}}
